title: Project Report: Automated API + UI Test Suite — QA & Test Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: pytest API tests + Playwright E2E for login flow; run in GitHub Actions on every PR.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Automated API + UI Test Suite** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for QA & Test Engineer. Duration: 3–4 weeks. pytest API tests + Playwright E2E for login flow; run in GitHub Actions on every PR. Tools: pytest, Playwright, GitHub Actions, httpx.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: pytest API test collection
Objective: Playwright E2E login + navigation
Objective: GitHub Actions CI pipeline
Objective: Test coverage report for API
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
QA & Test Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a QA & Test Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a QA & Test Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: API
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: API** *(Level: Intermediate)*

pytest + httpx tests. Complete these tasks: Auth endpoints; CRUD tests. Deliverable for this phase: API test suite.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Auth endpoints
- [ ] CRUD tests
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase API is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
QA & Test Engineer agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the API test suite to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: Test repo; CI pipeline; HTML report; E2E videos. Skills demonstrated: pytest, Playwright, CI/CD. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Test repo
Deliverable: CI pipeline
Deliverable: HTML report
Deliverable: E2E videos
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Test repo and passes the rubric.
